We believe that a little indulgence can bring a lot of joy.
Thats why were dedicated to crafting moreish gluten free snacks for everyone to enjoy.
An Aussie party favourite, these light and chewy Honey Joys are a scrumptious blend of golden cornflakes and crispy rice puffs that buzz with the flavour of honey.
Full of gluten free goodness and with less than a teaspoon of sugar per serve, the whole family will love them!
Everyone deserves deliciousness.

Springhill Farm Rice Puff Bar Vanilla Sprinkles 4 Pack

Discover the light, crispy goodness of a Springhill Farm Rice Puff Bar — a muesli bar-style healthy kids snack made with choc chips and designed for busy days.
These lunchbox snacks are:
A source of protein
A source of fibre
Suitable for vegetarians
Less than 4g sugar per serve
Gluten free
Made with no artificial colours, flavours or sweeteners
Perfect as school snacks, after-school fuel or an easy healthy snack on the go, they’re portioned for lunchboxes and loved by kids - with goodness parents can trust.
Aussie made & owned
3.5 Health Star Rating

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Break The Habit not the Bank with Herron Nicaway Lozenges. ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE.

Herron Nicaway Stop Smoking Lozenges provide an affordable, and convenient Nicotine Replacment Therapy for smokers to help beat cravings on their quit journey.

Extra Strength.

Helps you stop smoking.

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings:
Do not use if:
- you are under 12 years of age
- you are a non smoker
Unless advised by a doctor - do not use if:
-  you have had a heart attack or stroke
-  you have any circulatory problems.
Keep out of reach children.
Ask your doctor or pharmacist before use if:
- you are pregnant or breastfeeding
- you are under 18 years of age
- you have high blood pressure that is not controlled
- you have a stomach ulcer
- you have kidney or liver disease
- you have an overactive thyroid or adrenal gland cancer
- you take insulin for diabetes. AdditionalAttributes.description:
Need sensitive protection for larger wounds? Elastoplast has you covered. Elastoplast Sensitive XL Sterile Dressings are extra skin friendly with strong adhesion and made with breathable material so you can cover and protect minor wounds.

Elastoplast Sensitive XL Dressings are sterile wound coverings for protection of everyday larger wounds on those with sensitive skin types. With their skin-friendly, soft and breathable material, they adhere securely yet are easy to remove. The extra-large and highly absorbent wound pad cushions your wound without sticking to it, providing high comfort during wear and has strong adhesion, keeping the dressing on through various types of conditions. The dressings are available in four different sizes, which seal all around the wound to help protect from contamination and infection: XL – 6cm x 7cm, XXL – 8cm x 10cm, 3XL - 10cm x 15cm and 4XL – 10cm x 20cm. Clean and dry the wound properly then apply the plaster without stretching to avoid creases and achieve best results. The dressing also contains 0% latex.

Always read the label and follow the directions for use.

Sensitive and breathable: dressing keeps the wound dry and blocked from dirt and bacteria

Skin friendly: flexible fabric with wound pad protects and cushions the wound

Secure adhesion: sticks reliably to cover and protect minor, medium to large wounds

Highly absorbent: non-stick for ease in removal

Suitable for everyday use: Latex free and sterile

TgaAttributes.Directions: Clean wound and gently dry skin. Apply without stretching.

- 24 hours in children aged 3-6 years.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
These Brown Rice Cakes are light and crunchy, and packed full of the goodness of organically grown wholegrain Jasmine Brown Rice. No ‘nasty’ stuff added.

Jasmine rice, distinguished by its rich, lovely aroma and mild nutty flavour, is a heritage long grain, aromatic rice grown in its original form only in Thailand. The nutrient-rich paddies are traditionally farmed by families, so the rice is lovingly cared for throughout its cultivation. A ‘photo-period sensitive’ variety, jasmine rice can only be cultivated once a year. Upon harvesting, it is processed in the only organic mill in Thailand, ensuring that no adulteration of non-organic grains is possible.

Enjoy the tasty flavour of Ceres Organics Brown Rice Cakes straight from the pack or with your favourite toppings.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Medjool Dates. Delicious and featuring Golden Palm quality, they're ideal for snacking any time. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Golden Palm Medjool Dates are a naturally sweet and satisfying snack. These large, plump dates offer a rich, caramel-like flavour and a soft, chewy texture. They are perfect for enjoying on their own or adding to your favourite recipes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose dates that are plump and moist with a rich, uniform colour. Avoid any that appear excessively dry or hard.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Medjool Dates as a delicious and convenient snack straight from the punnet. They are also wonderful pitted and stuffed with nuts or cheese, added to smoothies, or chopped into baking recipes like energy bars and cakes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Medjool Dates in a cool, dry place at room temperature for up to two months. For extended freshness, keep them in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Medjool Dates can be incorporated into baking recipes for natural sweetness. They are also excellent blended into sauces or purees.</section>
